title: partial payments, DATEV, SEPA, e-invoicing (Factur-X/XRechnung), foreign currency
description:
## Summary

Merges all billing work from `feature/invoice-teilbezahlt` (63 commits, developed over several weeks):

- **Partial payments**: invoice-payments ledger, record-payment modal in admin, EÜR emission moved to payment-time
- **Foreign currency**: ECB EUR rate lookup at invoice creation, Kursdifferenz booking on payment
- **DATEV EXTF**: export endpoint + period picker widget + Steuerberater email handoff
- **SEPA pain.008**: direct debit XML export with mandate validation
- **Factur-X / XRechnung**: CII D16B EN 16931 e-invoicing (Kleinunternehmer + reverse-charge), PDF/A-3 blob columns
- **Reverse charge**: EU B2B enforcement, buyer VAT ID required, §13b PDF notice, VIES validation
- **E2E**: FA-21 invoice lifecycle (partial/full payment)
- **Plan docs**: design specs for contact/supplier schema rework (markdown only)

## Test plan

- [ ] `task website:deploy ENV=mentolder && task website:deploy ENV=korczewski`
- [ ] Admin → Rechnungen: record a partial payment, verify status label updates
- [ ] DATEV export: download EXTF for a period, verify CSV structure
- [ ] E2E: `./tests/runner.sh local FA-21`
